name: the sync is resumable: once a changed hash is recorded it is not reprocessed next run
command:
mkdir -p state
printf '{"content_hash":"sha256:NEW"}' > state/owasp-asvs.json
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/universal-coverage-sync.sh --state-dir state --ledger l.jsonl --no-promote --now 2026-06-15T01:00:00Z >/dev/null 2>&1
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/universal-coverage-sync.sh --state-dir state --ledger l.jsonl --no-promote --now 2026-06-15T02:00:00Z
